data.raceComments: {"comment":"9. PARAGON MAGICWAY missed the placings for the second time in a row last start when 6 metres away in fourth over 1609m at this track. Recent form includes a win at this track three starts back on March 18. Drawn to enjoy a cosy run but might need things to go his way at some stage. Tackles a similar assignment and he can finish a lot closer this time. 4. JUU DEE KAA finished third last start over 1609m at this track, beaten 11 metres, after also filling a minor placing at the previous appearance over 1609m at this track. Tackles a similar assignment and she can give this a mighty shake. 3. LOCKKEEPERS DREAM disappointed last time when ninth over 1609m at this track. Can atone. 1. SWEET EMILY T has drawn to advantage and should give backers a great sight.","runners":[9,4,3,1],"exclusive":false}
